title: Export Calendar
excerpt: I would like to share a clean PDF, month by month, of a calendar. Currently, you can only export the board to a PDF which results in only the existing view showing up on one page (not multiple months)

posts.author: mmrichs (Mitch)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to share a clean PDF, month by month, of a calendar. Currently, you can only export the board to a PDF which results in only the existing view showing up on one page (not multiple months)

posts.author: Gbolyard (Garrick Bolyard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Wanna know something even worse. When exporting the pdfs month to month, Monday does not show what month is being exported. How lame is that. The Calendar view is one of the most under iterated features on this program. Cant share a calendar without adding the client as a member of your board. Cant export without it being completely unusable. Cant save it without it being completely unusable.

I have been harping on Monday to fix so many low hanging fruits, and yet they never listen. Really a shame.

posts.author: Kristi (Kristi Fuxan)
posts.cookedHtml: Will it ever be possible to export a useable calendar, with the Month on it? The absence of this feature is astounding to me. I need to print calendars (since it is a cumbersome nightmare to share them) and you can not export a clean useable calendar. is this on the radar to fix?

posts.author: Han_Fick (Hannah Fick )
posts.cookedHtml: Desperate for this feature to be included! Currently my clients can only see one month at a time when I give them a shareable link, however all of our planning is 3-12 months in advance. Can we get this looked at?

posts.author: efowler99 (Eric Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml: Has monday.com responded to this issue? This system lacks the most basic common sense features.. So frustrating

posts.author: jcullar (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml: Commenting to bump up. this is still an issue and seems like an easy fix

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Gbolyard @Kristi @Han_Fick, We built an app called MasterPlan Calendar for Monday that could help with this. It lets you view and manage your calendar more flexibly, and you can export it as a clean PDF. It also includes a bunch of other features beyond the native calendar to make scheduling and planning easier.

Here’s the link if you’d like to check it out: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/masterplan-calendar
